ab: ipoingaw nyamo, sesane ki singsi ka ameamece amimitiya. Mwa tacekecekelane swapepeale na maodranga.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: esi! tatakaese na maodrange ’apobaka bakaita ka thakongadavane.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說多納語。
en: B: Okay! We have to speak thakongadavane to the seniors.
A: Are we almost there?
B:Almost there.
B: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: laka waigo’o komo thoakongadangadavane! Maagi’i sawkoanga!
ch: A:你們會說多納語啊!真是太棒了!
en: A: You guys speak thakongadavane! That’s great!

ab: ipoingaw nyamo, sesane ki singsi ka ameamece amimitiya mwa tabecengane ’akamolo.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.
B: Yes, sir.

ab: ngoalra kita matiliba, ’angoingava wameca na sa’akamolimo.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: e’e, singsi, waamecenga kiname na sa’akamokamoliname.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.
A: Are we there yet?
B: Not yet, it’s still far away.
A: You go watering.
B: Okay, I’ll water it.
A: You go get the bird catcher.
B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: ipoingaw nyamo, sesane ka wamikita tathadethade’ane na sanagolagolay.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?
A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: pa’ingcega kita matilibi, pathagilinga mikita loangay na kipe.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.
B: Yes.

ab: talocobongane ka sana’alralrame, ikodrangane ka sana’asoa’a. tawwa kita cengecengele.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.
B: I’m afraid of snakes.
A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: mwaninga na sesesane na koli’i ka ’awkayya kita ’asawbo.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.
B: Yes, thank you.
A: What did you see today?

ab: wacengele kake ’angiyadraw na soa’a. lacengelela ’angiyadraw na alralrame.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.
A: Hurry up, we have to go.
B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.
A: Shall we go swimming together?
B:Yes! Let’s go!
A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: tyabao nadroway, takicibane ikay nakay loangolanpoy.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
